phases.name: Write extraction tests for prompt files
phases.reasoning: Add extraction_tests module to prompt_loader.rs with tests covering: file existence for all 4 specialists, required markdown sections (## Role, ## Focus Areas, ## Instructions, ## Output Format), PromptConfig correctness (specialist_name, mode, focus_areas match hardcoded), YAML frontmatter validity, and verification that configs load from file not defaults. Tests use real .forge/ directory via env!(CARGO_MANIFEST_DIR). All tests should fail RED since prompt files don't exist yet.

phases.name: Create 4 extracted prompt files
phases.reasoning: Create .forge/autoresearch/prompts/ directory and write 4 .md files (security-sentinel.md, performance-oracle.md, architecture-strategist.md, simplicity-reviewer.md). Each file has YAML frontmatter with specialist name and mode (with '# informational only' comment), and markdown body with ## Role, ## Focus Areas (bullet items character-for-character matching SpecialistType::focus_areas()), ## Instructions, and ## Output Format sections. Gating specialists: SecuritySentinel, ArchitectureStrategist. Advisory specialists: PerformanceOracle, SimplicityReviewer. Verify YAML comment doesn't break serde_yaml parsing. All extraction tests must pass GREEN.
